laws.title: Color Contrast
laws.description: Insufficient color contrast for text on category banners.
laws.remediation: Increase contrast by adjusting the background color for banners.

laws.title: Font Size Consistency
laws.description: Inconsistent font sizes on product detail pages.
laws.remediation: Standardize font sizes in product descriptions using a base design token.

laws.title: Button Style Inconsistency
laws.description: Variable padding and border radius on primary buttons across pages.
laws.remediation: Ensure consistent padding and border radius for primary buttons.

laws.title: Iconography Uniformity
laws.description: Different styles of icons used in navigation menus.
laws.remediation: Adopt a uniform icon style based on the design system.

laws.title: Image Aspect Ratios
laws.description: Product images have inconsistent aspect ratios causing layout shifts.
laws.remediation: Implement a consistent aspect ratio for all product images.
